workshoptitle: End-to-End Application Observability on OCI with OCTO APM Demo

tutorials.title: OCTO APM Demo Quickstart Deployment
tutorials.description: Deploy OCTO APM Demo from adibirzu/octo-observability-demo and verify the Drone Shop, Enterprise CRM Portal, Java payment sidecar, ATP, and observability endpoints.

tutorials.title: Connect OCI Observability Services
tutorials.description: Connect OCI APM, Monitoring, Log Analytics Kubernetes and Security solutions, Database Management, Ops Insights, Events, and Resource Analytics.

tutorials.title: Trace a Customer Transaction End to End
tutorials.description: Generate a deterministic OCTO request, inspect its distributed trace, and pivot to correlated Log Analytics records.

tutorials.title: Investigate Application and Database Incidents
tutorials.description: Investigate an OKE workload, security posture, and a database-bound bottleneck with Log Analytics, APM, Ops Insights, and Database Management.

tutorials.title: Operationalize Monitoring, Events, and Resource Analytics
tutorials.description: Validate alarms, route a Resource Manager event, and query OCI Resource Analytics for OCTO inventory and relationship context.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Template to link to Need Help lab at the end of workshop.
